item.title: Ph.D. at The Chinese University of Hong Kong (CUHK)
item.description: 2025.01 - Now, Department of Computer Science and Engineering (CSE), The Chinese University of Hong Kong (CUHK)

item.title: Research Intern at Machine Learning Platform, Tencent
item.description: 2024.10 - Now, joined Tencent under supervision of Ruobing Xie, Senior Researcher at Tencent.

item.title: Research Intern at Microsoft Research Asia (MSRA)
item.description: 2024.01 - 2024.07, joined MSRA under supervision of Li Dong, Principal Researcher of MSRA.

item.title: Research Intern at RHOS lab (MVIG-RHOS, SJTU)
item.description: 2021.09 - 2023.11, joined RHOS lab under supervision of Prof. Yonglu Li.

item.title: B.Eng. at Shanghai Jiao Tong University (SJTU)
item.description: 2020.09 - 2024.06, School of Electronic, Information and Electrical Engineering (SEIEE), Shanghai Jiao Tong University (SJTU)
